ogTitle: Duri vs Durran Durra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Duri and Durran Durra.
heading: Duri vs Durran Durra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Duri, New South Wales and Durran Durra, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Duri (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Duri or Durran Durra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Duri has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Durran Durra scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Duri scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Durran Durra scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Duri or Durran Durra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Durran Durra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
